arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى الْإِنسَانِ حِينٌ مِّنَ الدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْئًا مَّذْكُورًا
english translation text:
Has there been a period of time for man when he was not anything worthy of mention?
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا
english translation text:
Indeed We created man from the drop of a mixed fluid so that We may put him to test, so We endowed with hearing and sight.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
english translation text:
Indeed We have guided him to the way, be he grateful or ungrateful.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّا أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَافِرِينَ سَلَاسِلَ وَأَغْلَالًا وَسَعِيرًا
english translation text:
Indeed for the faithless We have prepared chains, iron collars, and a blaze.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّ الْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
english translation text:
Indeed the pious will drink from a cup seasoned with Kafur,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ اللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
english translation text:
a spring where Allah’s servants will drink, making it gush forth as they please.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: يُوفُونَ بِالنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُ مُسْتَطِيرًا
english translation text:
They fulfill their vows and fear a day whose ill will be widespread.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَيُطْعِمُونَ الطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
english translation text:
For the love of Him, they feed the needy, the orphan and the prisoner,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَاءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
english translation text:
[saying,] ‘We feed you only for the sake of Allah. We desire no reward from you, nor thanks.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
english translation text:
Indeed we fear a frowning and fateful day from our Lord.’
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: فَوَقَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّاهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
english translation text:
So Allah saved them from that day’s ills and graced them with freshness [on this faces] and joy [in their hearts].
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَجَزَاهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
english translation text:
He rewarded them for their patience with a garden and [garments of] silk,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: مُّتَّكِئِينَ فِيهَا عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
english translation text:
reclining therein on couches, without facing any [scorching] sun, or [biting] cold.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَالُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
english translation text:
Its shades will be close over them and its clusters [of fruits] will be hanging low.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِآنِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا
english translation text:
They will be served around with vessels of silver and goblets of crystal
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: قَوَارِيرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
english translation text:
—crystal of silver— [from] which they will dispense in a precise measure.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
english translation text:
They will be served therein with a cup of a drink seasoned with Zanjabeel,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
english translation text:
from a spring in it named Salsabeel.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَانٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
english translation text:
They will be waited upon by immortal youths, whom, were you to see them, you will suppose them to be scattered pearls.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
english translation text:
As you look on, you will see there bliss and a great kingdom.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: عَالِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوا أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
english translation text:
Upon them will be cloaks of green silk and brocade and they will be adorned with bracelets of silver. Their Lord will give them to drink a pure drink.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
english translation text:
[They will be told]: ‘This is your reward, and your efforts have been well-appreciated.’
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ تَنزِيلًا
english translation text:
Indeed We have sent down to you the Quran in a gradual descent.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: فَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ آثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
english translation text:
So submit patiently to the judgement of your Lord and do not obey any sinner or ingrate from among them,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَاذْكُرِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
english translation text:
and celebrate the Name of your Lord morning and evening,
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَاسْجُدْ لَهُ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
english translation text:
and worship Him for a watch of the night and glorify Him the night long.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ يُحِبُّونَ الْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَاءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
english translation text:
Indeed they love this transitory life, and disregard a heavy day that is ahead of them.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَاهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَا أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَا أَمْثَالَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
english translation text:
We created them and strengthened their joints, and We will replace them with others like them whenever We like.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا
english translation text:
This is indeed a reminder. So let anyone who wishes take the way toward his Lord.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
english translation text:
But you will not wish unless it is willed by Allah. Indeed Allah is all-knowing, all-wise.
Al Insan – The Man

arabic text: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَاءُ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ ۚ وَالظَّالِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
english translation text:
He admits whomever He wishes into His mercy, and He has prepared a painful punishment for the wrongdoers.
Al Insan – The Man
